name: Sunrise Resources PLC Registere
summary: Sunrise Resources Plc is a United Kingdom-based company focused on the exploration and development of industrial minerals projects. The company's projects include CS Pozzolan-Perlite Project, Hazen Pozzolan Project, NewPerl Project, Pioche Sepiolite Project, and the Bay State Silver Project. Sunrise Resources is headquartered in Macclesfield, UK.
